$comment: Hand-vendored minimal permissive schema for syncpack's config (.syncpackrc.json). syncpack v15 (the Rust rewrite) publishes NO JSON Schema — it is absent from SchemaStore and ships no schema in its npm package or GitHub dist — so this schema is intentionally NOT in packages/shared/utils/sync/src/schemas.ts SCHEMA_SOURCES and is excluded from sync:check. It exists so an editor's $schema resolves offline and `check-jsonschema --check-metaschema` passes. Permissive by design: it pins the shape of the keys this repo uses (indent/sortFirst/sortAz/versionGroups/semverGroups) while allowing other syncpack keys via additionalProperties.
title: syncpack Configuration
description: Configuration file for syncpack (.syncpackrc.json) — dependency version consistency and package.json field sorting.

$schema.description: Path or URL to this JSON Schema, for editor validation.

indent.description: The whitespace used to indent package.json when written (e.g. a tab or spaces).

source.description: Glob patterns for the package.json files syncpack reads.

sortFirst.description: package.json keys hoisted to the top, in this order, before the rest are sorted.

sortAz.description: package.json keys whose object/array contents are sorted alphabetically.

sortPackages.description: Whether to sort the discovered packages.

sortExports.description: Order for the conditions inside an `exports` map.

formatBugs.description: Normalise the `bugs` field to shorthand when possible.

formatRepository.description: Normalise the `repository` field to shorthand when possible.

versionGroups.description: Rules grouping dependencies whose versions must agree (or be pinned/banned).

semverGroups.description: Rules enforcing a semver range style (e.g. exact vs caret) on grouped dependencies.
